execution_notice: Read-only approval-scope diff. It grants no approval and does not assign, start, complete, enqueue, or execute service workers.

allowed_actions: after explicit approval, inspect approved signed-in research surface in read-only mode
capture local notes and source references
avoid likes, follows, replies, posts, settings, messages, and account changes
scope_diffs.next_action: Record an approved approval row with the exact scope before assignment or start.
prohibited_actions: enter credentials, OTPs, personal data, private files, payment details, tax/KYC data, or wallet information
publish, post, reply, comment, message, list, upload, or contact external parties
purchase, deposit, withdraw, trade, connect wallet, sign wallet messages, or perform real-money actions
bypass paywalls, rate limits, access controls, or platform rules
stop_conditions: service request status is not approved or assigned
requested action exceeds approval scope
required artifact/source is missing or ambiguous
page requires unapproved login, signup, consent, payment, private data, credentials, OTP, wallet action, file upload, or public submission
worker would need to leave allowed host/scope

prohibited_actions: entering credentials, OTPs, payment details, personal data, private files, or wallet information

stop_conditions: The source service request is not approved and assigned
Any page asks for login, signup, account creation, seller onboarding, consent acceptance, payment, tax, KYC, private data, credentials, OTP, wallet action, or file upload
A required page is not public or requires a signed-in state
A link leaves the allowed hosts
The browser worker cannot distinguish public guidance from contractual acceptance
The task would require a public action, marketplace listing, or real-money/payment action
